hero.title: Shanno · Indie AI Product Studio
hero.subtitle: AI tools built for global users
hero.description: A one-person studio building practical AI tools for global users. Every product starts from real-world needs, helping you cut costs, save effort, and free up time to create greater value.

pricing.subhead: Choose the tool that fits your needs. Pay only for what you use.

products.sectionDescription: From concrete apps to a trial decision engine and global payment tools, one stack to go from “built” to “paid”.
products.sectionHeadline: Turn a small product into one that makes money

enCards.name: EN Cards · English memory decks
enCards.description: The hardest grammar points are turned into fun, memorable cards. Examples are based on real-life scenes in major Chinese cities. Try 20 cards for free, then unlock the full 100-card deck with a one-time purchase.

trialJudgment.name: Trial Decision Engine
trialJudgment.description: The brain that decides whether a visitor is free, on trial, or paying, and automatically matches the right features and experience on every visit. Segment users without touching code, control features, quotas, and upgrade prompts so the path to paid feels clear, not pushy.

paddlePayment.name: Paddle Payment Toolkit
paddlePayment.description: A payment butler for your digital products. Handle subscriptions, one-off purchases, and multi-currency checkout for a global audience while you focus on building. Stripe-level DX and one of the go-to payment rails for indie builders going global.

leaseAi.tagline: AI-powered US lease review in 30 seconds
leaseAi.taglineCn: Smart US lease review, understand trap clauses in 30 seconds
